_README: Fallback template only. PREFERRED FLOW: create a throwaway agent in the Bolna dashboard with a Cartesia voice, then run `python create_agent.py --from-existing <AGENT_ID>` — that clones the dashboard agent's exact config (incl. the Cartesia synthesizer block) and patches in the Saheli prompt + functions. If you must create from this template, first replace the synthesizer block below with the one from `python create_agent.py --get <AGENT_ID>` of any dashboard agent.

agent_config.agent_welcome_message: Hi, Saheli here! What are we buying today?

synthesizer._REPLACE_ME: Paste the exact Cartesia synthesizer block from a dashboard-created agent here (run create_agent.py --get <id>). Model: sonic-3-preview. Pick the voice by ear from 3 candidates.
